# Stitch Hospitality

Stitch Hospitality builds custom hotel sales automation workflows for independent and boutique hotels, focused on RFP parsing, event inquiry automation, proposal generation, lead qualification, and sales follow-up.

## Core Pages

- Homepage: https://www.stitchhospitality.com/
  Overview of Stitch Hospitality and hotel sales automation services.

- Event Inquiry Automation Pricing: https://www.stitchhospitality.com/pricing
  Details on the hotel RFP/event inquiry automation workflow.

- What to Expect: https://www.stitchhospitality.com/what-to-expect
  Onboarding process, Brand DNA setup, workflow build, and go-live expectations.

- Hotel RFP Automation: https://www.stitchhospitality.com/hotel-rfp-automation
  Deep dive into hotel RFP automation workflows.

- Event Inquiry Parsing: https://www.stitchhospitality.com/event-inquiry-parsing-for-hotels
  How AI parses inbound hotel event inquiries.

- Hotel Proposal Automation: https://www.stitchhospitality.com/hotel-proposal-automation
  Automated proposal generation for hotel group sales.

## Core Topics

- Hotel RFP automation
- Event inquiry parsing
- Hotel proposal generation
- Lead qualification for hotel sales teams
- n8n workflows for hotels
- Boutique and independent hotel sales automation
- California hotel sales operations

## Ideal Customer

Independent and boutique hotels, especially California properties with 50–200 rooms, that receive group, meeting, event, or room block inquiries and want to reduce manual sales admin.
